center.name: William Swainson
center.summary: William Swainson是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联25种鸟类，包括塔陶穴䳍、綠紫耳蜂鳥、Russet-crowned motmot等25种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-backed woodpecker (Picoides arcticus), also known as the Arctic three-toed woodpecker, is a medium-sized woodpecker ( long) inhabiting the forests of North America

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-faced monarch (Monarcha melanopsis) is a passerine songbird in the family Monarchidae found along the eastern seaboard of Australia, and also New Guinea (where most birds migrate to during the austral winter; May to August)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-necked red cotinga (Phoenicircus nigricollis) is a species of bird in the family Cotingidae, the cotingas. It is found in Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: solivagus at Pilanesberg, South Africa | image2 = Brubru (Nilaus afer) (022A-WA03044X0030-0002M0).ogg | image2_caption = Song recorded in Kiboko, Kenya | genus = Nilaus | parent_authority = Swainson, 1827 | species = afer | authority = (Latham, 1801) | synonyms = *Nilaus capensis }} The brubru (Nilaus afer) is a species of bushshrike (family Malaconotidae) found in most of Sub-Saharan Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Cassin's kingbird (Tyrannus vociferans) is a large tyrant flycatcher native to western North America

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The curve-billed thrasher (Toxostoma curvirostre) is a medium-sized mimid native to most of Mexico and to the deserts of southwestern United States

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The fasciated wren (Campylorhynchus fasciatus) is a species of bird in the family Troglodytidae

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The gray-crowned rosy finch or gray-crowned rosy-finch (Leucosticte tephrocotis) is a species of passerine bird in the family Fringillidae native to Alaska, western Canada, and the north-western United States

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The half-collared kingfisher (Alcedo semitorquata) is a kingfisher in the subfamily Alcedininae that is found in southern and eastern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The large-headed flatbill (Ramphotrigon megacephalum), also known as the bamboo flatbill, is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, Guyana, Paraguay, Peru, Suriname, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Lewin's honeyeater (Meliphaga lewinii) is a bird that inhabits the ranges along the east coast of Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The russet-crowned motmot (Momotus mexicanus) is a species of motmot native to north-western Mexico and central Guatemala.{{Cite journal|last=Murphy, T

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The slate-throated whitestart (Myioborus miniatus), also known as the slate-throated redstart, is a small insectivorous bird in the New World warbler family Parulidae that is native to Central and South America

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The western oriole (Oriolus brachyrynchus), or western black-headed oriole, is a species of bird in the family Oriolidae that is native to Africa. The adult upperparts are yellow-olive, and the underparts are yellow in colour

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Panama, on Trinidad, and across northern South America. It is also called Swainson's antcatcher (usually in historical sources) after William Swainson, who first described it scientifically

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The crested jayshrike or crested shrikejay (Platylophus galericulatus), formerly known as the crested jay (despite not being a true jay), is a species of bird found in Brunei, Indonesia, Malaysia, Myanmar, and Thailand

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: lepidotus (Swainson, 1837) | range_map = Crypturellus tataupa map.svg }} The Tataupa tinamou (Crypturellus tataupa) is a type of tinamou commonly found in dry forest in subtropical and tropical regions in southeastern South America

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The grey-headed canary-flycatcher (Culicicapa ceylonensis), sometimes known as the grey-headed flycatcher, is a species of small flycatcher-like bird found in tropical Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: dusiti (Khao Yai National Park, Thailand) | image2=Pellorneumruficeps nandi.ogg | image2_caption = Calls (nominate race from India) | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Pellorneum | species = ruficeps | authority = Swainson, 1832 }} The puff-throated babbler or spotted babbler (Pellorneum ruficeps) is a species of passerine bird found in Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The rufous-winged antshrike (Thamnophilus torquatus) is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, and Paraguay.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Mexican violetear (Colibri thalassinus) is a medium-sized, metallic green hummingbird species commonly found in forested areas from Mexico to Nicaragua

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Pytilia phoenicoptera |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T103813118A263879876 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T103813118A263879876.en |access-date=23 February 2025}} | genus = Pytilia | species = phoenicoptera | authority = Swainson, 1837 }} The red-winged pytilia (Pytilia phoenicoptera) is a common species of estrildid finch found in Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Sitta frontalis |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22711216A263902563 |doi= |access-date=29 December 2024}} | genus = Sitta | species = frontalis | authority = Swainson, 1820 }} The velvet-fronted nuthatch (Sitta frontalis) is a small passerine bird in the nuthatch family Sittidae found in southern Asia, from Nepal, India, Sri Lanka ‍and Bangladesh east to southwestern China and Indonesia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The crimson seedcracker (Pyrenestes sanguineus) is a common species of estrildid finch found in Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The long-tailed broadbill (Psarisomus dalhousiae) is a species of bird that is found in the Himalayas, extending east through Northeastern India to Southeast Asia
